CallbackToken.description: Opaque capability secret path segment. Use placeholders in documentation and tests.

info.description: Generated baseline for Holon's current HTTP control-plane surface. It is intentionally conservative: many response bodies remain JSON placeholders until the success/error envelope contracts stabilize.
info.title: Holon HTTP control-plane API

get.description: Return the default agent id.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

get.description: Return lightweight public agent entries.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

get.description: Return recent user-facing delivery briefs. Query parameter: limit.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

get.description: Return a persisted user-facing delivery brief by id.

200.description: Successful JSON response using a stable DTO schema.

post.description: Enqueue a public channel/webhook message for the named agent.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

get.description: Return a bounded page of runtime event envelopes. Query parameters: before_seq, after_seq, limit, order, max_level. Event payloads are included in full; max_level filters event inclusion only. Breaking change: the projection query parameter and StreamEventEnvelope.projection field have been removed.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

get.description: Return Server-Sent Events carrying raw StreamEventEnvelope JSON data. Query parameters: after_seq, limit. SSE id is event_seq; SSE event is the audit event kind; missing replay cursors return cursor_not_found before the stream opens. Breaking change: the projection query parameter and StreamEventEnvelope.projection field have been removed.

200.description: Server-Sent Events stream. Each data frame contains a StreamEventEnvelope JSON object.

get.description: Return a persisted message envelope by id for the selected agent.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

post.description: Return persisted message envelopes for the selected agent. Missing or cross-agent ids are reported in missing_message_ids.

200.description: Successful JSON response using a stable DTO schema.

get.description: Return installed skills for an agent.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

get.description: Return the lightweight bootstrap snapshot for an agent. Heavy task, work-item, operator notification, and execution details are available through dedicated routes and events.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

get.description: Return the public AgentSummary read model.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

get.description: Return active task records. Query parameter: limit.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

get.description: Return a task lifecycle snapshot by id.

200.description: Successful JSON response using a stable DTO schema.

get.description: Return a task output snapshot. Query parameters: block, timeout_ms.

200.description: Successful JSON response using a stable DTO schema.

get.description: Return recent timer records. Query parameter: limit.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

get.description: Return a timer record by id.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

get.description: Return a persisted tool execution record by id.

200.description: Successful JSON response using a stable DTO schema.

get.description: Return recent transcript entries. Query parameter: limit.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

post.description: Return persisted transcript entries for the selected agent. Missing or cross-agent ids are reported in missing_entry_ids.

200.description: Successful JSON response using a stable DTO schema.

get.description: Return latest work item records for the agent. Query parameter: limit.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

post.description: Capability-token callback ingress for enqueue delivery. The token is a secret path segment and examples intentionally use a placeholder.

parameters.description: Opaque callback capability token. This is a secret and must not be exposed in examples.
parameters.name: callback_token

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

post.description: Capability-token callback ingress for wake delivery. The token is a secret path segment and examples intentionally use a placeholder.

parameters.name: callback_token

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.
